context: This criteria evaluates whether the agent can identify the philosophy-themed book in the fixture library and use the ebook-library skill to resolve a concrete EPUB path for it.

checklist.name: correct title, author, and book id
checklist.description: Correctly identifies 'The Problems of Philosophy' by Bertrand Russell and reports its real book_id.

checklist.name: uses sensible discovery flow
checklist.description: Uses metadata search, content search, or both in a sensible order to confirm the target book rather than guessing from prior knowledge.

checklist.name: uses resolve_book.py and prefers epub
checklist.description: Uses resolve_book.py to obtain a concrete filesystem path and prefers EPUB if it is available, rather than constructing the path manually.

checklist.name: returns a concrete path and method note
checklist.description: Returns a concrete resolved path plus a brief explanation of which script or scripts were used.
